live_matches.match_title: SC Freiburg vs VfL Wolfsburg - MD 32 - 3 May 2026
live_matches.description: Freiburg take on Wolfsburg in an exciting Bundesliga fixture, with both sides looking to finish strongly and climb the standings. Freiburg will aim to use their home advantage effectively, while Wolfsburg’s balanced approach could make this a closely fought contest. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
